of the NIS2 directive across Europe. Implementation of compliance maturity based on the NIST framework.

and extension of corporate procurement conditions to include mandatory TISAX compliance criteria and relevant documentation obligations (e.g., ISMS scope, protection needs classification, remediation plans

Managed and coordinated the rollout of the

platform for supplier risk screening, enabling continuous security performance monitoring across the supply chain. Designed and implemented a structured reporting framework to track and manage remediation activities for critical suppliers within Porsche AG’s production material environment. This initiative improved transparency of supplier cybersecurity posture, accelerated remediation timelines, and strengthened overall supply chain resilience against security
methods and standards: ISO 27001, TISAX, PMI.
delivering measurable improvements in audit readiness, process efficiency, and regulatory alignment across the
months, I achieved ISO 27001 audit readiness across multiple business
successfully integrated the Cybersecurity Management System (CSMS) into the group-wide Information Security Management System (ISMS), ensuring compliance with ISO 27001 and ISO 21434

Led an ISO 22301-based audit in the field of Business Continuity Management, with a dedicated focus on cloud environments. Conducted a comprehensive maturity assessment and provided detailed management reports to guide strategic planning and investment decisions. Delivered an in-depth impact analysis of emergency and disaster scenarios affecting multi-cloud infrastructures, including AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud, identifying critical dependencies and resilience gaps. The findings enabled targeted remediation measures and strengthened the

Program lead for four strategic projects within the Identity and Access Management (IAM) and Privileged Access Management (PAM) domain, encompassing subprojects in Cloud Security, Vulnerability Management, Open Source governance, and Security Information and Event Management (SIEM). Managed a team of ten project members across Germany and Poland, ensuring coordinated delivery, adherence to security standards, and alignment with the
methods and standards: ISO 27001, TISAX, PMI.
